# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO |
| FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO |
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO |
| REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES |
| CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Account creation timestamp | NO |
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO |

**Business Concept Mapping**: Customer

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO |
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO |
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO |
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO |

**Foreign Keys**:
- CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: Product

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree.

**Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO |
| CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |
| PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

**Foreign Keys**:
- PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference]

**Business Concept Mapping**: Category

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO |
| CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO |
| TOTAL_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Total order value | NO |
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO |
| PAYMENT_CONFIRMED_AT | DATETIME | Payment confirmation timestamp | YES |
| DELIVERED_AT | DATETIME | Delivery timestamp | YES |
| CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Order creation timestamp | NO |

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Parent order | NO |
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Product ordered | NO |
| QUANTITY | INT | Number of units | NO |
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price at time of order | NO |
| LINE_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Extended amount (qty × price) | NO |

**Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: OrderLineItem

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PAYMENT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts.

**Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PAYMENT_ID | BIGINT | Unique payment identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Order being paid | NO |
| PAYMENT_METHOD | VARCHAR(50) | Credit card, PayPal, etc. | NO |
| AMOUNT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Payment amount | NO |
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/FAILED/REFUNDED | NO |
| CONFIRMED_AT | DATETIME | Payment confirmation timestamp | YES |
| CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Payment creation timestamp | NO |

**Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: Payment

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SHIPMENT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers.

**Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| SHIPMENT_ID | BIGINT | Unique shipment identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Order being fulfilled | NO |
| WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES |
| SHIPPED_AT | DATETIME | Ship timestamp | YES |
| TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES |
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO |

**Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: Shipment

═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

RELATIONSHIP SUMMARY
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR
OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM
Category         → TB_CATEGORY
Payment          → PAYMENT
Shipment         → SHIPMENT
